name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
setup: Sit and lie back, gripping bar slightly wider than shoulder-width
Feet flat on floor, retract scapulae
execution: Unrack and hold above upper chest
Lower bar to upper chest (clavicle level)
Touch and drive bar up and slightly back
common_mistakes: Bench angle too vertical (>60 degrees becomes shoulder press)
Lowering bar to mid-chest instead of upper chest
cues: Think 'pull the bar down to your chest' on eccentric
Drive bar toward your face on the way up
